name: Temocillin
description: Temocillin has been investigated in Infection, Liver Dysfunction, and Urinary Tract Infection.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Temocillin.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Temocillin.
